name: Midnight Radio
author: vibe-dev
tagline: Lo-fi beats streaming player for the 2AM coding sessions. Visualizer reacts to the music with generative pixel art.

name: Dream Journal
author: indie-soul
tagline: Record your dreams with a surreal, morphing text interface. AI generates abstract art from your dream descriptions.

name: Breathe
author: zen-coder
tagline: Minimalist breathing exercise companion. Watch the circle expand and contract. Nothing else. That's the whole app.

name: Pixel Mood
author: retro-vibes
tagline: Pixel art mood board that changes its color palette based on the time of day and your local weather.

name: Neon Chat
author: cyber-friend
tagline: AI companion with cyberpunk personality. Talk about philosophy, music, or the meaning of life at 3AM.

name: Stargazer
author: astro-vibe
tagline: Real-time night sky rendered in your browser. Point your cursor at the stars and discover their stories.
